---
title: "Italian Olive - DV&R"
author: "Daniele Mensorio"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r global_options, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    message = FALSE,
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    cache = TRUE,
    tidy = FALSE
)

```

```{r, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
library(gridExtra)
library(summarytools)
library(treemapify)
library(d3treeR)
library(treemap)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(ggpubr)

library(circlepackeR) 

library(patchwork)
library(waffle)
```

# Data

```{r}
olive <- read.csv("data/olive.csv")
#view(olive)
DT::datatable(olive)

#let's transform the 2 character variables (region and area) into a catgeorical variable
olive <- olive %>% 
  mutate(region = as_factor(region), 
         area = as_factor(area))
```

a.  **Who collected the data**

The data was collected by Prof. Dr. Johann Gasteiger and Prof. Dr. Jure Zupan in *Neural networks in chemistry and drug design.*

b.  **When was collected the data**

The data was collected on October 8, 1999

c.  **To which aim was collected the data**

The main aim is a comparison of classification abilities of two different neural network methods, namely, back-propagation of errors and Kohonen learning, performed on a set of 572 Italian olive oils on the basis of an analysis of eight fatty acids.

d.  **How many rows and how many variables (of what type)**

The data set contained 572 rows and 11 variables (columns).

Types of variable in the data-set:

-   `rownames` Number of each row. (*integer variable*)

-   `region` General region of Italy. (*character variable transformed into a categorical variable with levels* "`Southern Italy"`,"`Sardinia`" and "`Northern Italy`")

-   `area` Area of Italy. (*character variable transformed into a categorical variable with levels* "`North-Apulia`", "`Calabria`", "`South-Apulia`", "`Sicily`" ,"`Inland-Sardinia`", "`Coast-Sardinia`", "`Umbria`", "`East-Liguria`", "`West-Liguria`")

-   `palmitic` Percent palmitic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `palmitoleic` Percent palmitoleic of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `stearic` Percent stearic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `oleic` Percent oleic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `linoleic` Percent linoleic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `linolenic` Percent linolenic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `arachidic` Percent arachidic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

-   `eicosenoic` Percent eicosenoic acid of sample. (*numeric variable*)

e.  **What represents the rows**

Each observation represents an Italian olive oil.

f.  **In what field of research of study have been employed the data**

The data have been employed in Computational Chemistry and Molecular Modeling.

# Missing Values

```{r}
sapply(olive, function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
```

As seen in the table above, there is no missing value (i.e. na values) in the data-set.

# Outliers

```{r}
ggplot(olive, aes(x = rownames, y = region, fill = area)) + 
  geom_boxplot()
```

As seen in the box-plots above, there is no presence of outliers in the data-set.

# Data summary

```{r}
print(dfSummary(olive, 
                varnumbers   = FALSE, 
                valid.col    = FALSE, 
                graph.magnif = 0.76),
      method = 'render')
```

# Composition plot by region and area

```{r}
Pie_data <- olive %>% 
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),.groups = 'drop') %>% 
  mutate(perc=round(100*n/sum(n),1))
datatable(Pie_data)

Pie_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x="",y=perc, fill=region)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1,stat="identity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(perc,"%")),
            position=position_stack(0.5)) + 
  scale_fill_brewer("Blues") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) + 
  theme_void() + 
  labs(title="Pie Chart", subtitle = "Region", caption= "dataset Olive")

```

```{r}
Pie_data <- olive %>% 
  group_by(area) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),.groups = 'drop') %>% 
  mutate(perc=round(100*n/sum(n),1))
datatable(Pie_data)

Pie_data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x="",y=perc, fill=area)) +
  geom_bar(width = 1,stat="identity") + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(perc,"%")),
            position=position_stack(0.5)) + 
  scale_fill_brewer("Blues") +
  coord_polar("y", start=0) + 
  theme_void() + 
  labs(title="Pie chart", subtitle = "Area", caption= "dataset Olive")

```

```{r}
DATA1 <- olive %>%
  group_by(region, area) %>%
  summarise(n = n(),.groups = 'drop')
p1 <- treemap(DATA1,
             index=c("region", "area"),
             vSize="n",
             type="index",
             palette = "Set2",
             bg.labels=c("white"),
             align.labels=list(
               c("center", "center"), 
               c("right", "bottom")
             )  
           )  
d3tree2(p1 ,  rootname = "General" )
```

# Composition of fatty acid into olive oil

```{r}
data1 <- olive %>% 
  summarise(palmitic = (sum(palmitic)/n()),
            palmitoleic = (sum(palmitoleic)/n()), 
            stearic = (sum(stearic)/n()), 
            oleic = (sum(oleic)/n()), 
            linoleic = (sum(linoleic)/n()), 
            linolenic = (sum(linolenic)/n()), 
            arachidic = (sum(arachidic)/n()), 
            eicosenoic = (sum(eicosenoic)/n()), .groups = "drop")
datatable(data1)

data1_long <- gather(data1, key = "Oil", value = "Percentage")
ggplot(data1_long, aes(x = "", y = Percentage, fill = Oil)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") +
  coord_polar("y") +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() + 
  labs(title = "Percentage of Each Oil Type",
       fill = "Oil Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

# Composition of fatty oils into olive oil filtered by region

```{r}
data2 <- olive %>% 
  group_by(region) %>%
  summarise(palmitic = (sum(palmitic)/n()),
            palmitoleic = (sum(palmitoleic)/n()), 
            stearic = (sum(stearic)/n()), 
            oleic = (sum(oleic)/n()), 
            linoleic = (sum(linoleic)/n()), 
            linolenic = (sum(linolenic)/n()), 
            arachidic = (sum(arachidic)/n()), 
            eicosenoic = (sum(eicosenoic)/n()), .groups = "drop")
datatable(data2)
plot1 <- data2 %>% 
  filter(region == "Southern Italy") %>% 
  gather(key = "variable", value = "value", -region)
pc1 <- ggplot(plot1, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = variable)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() + 
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Southern italy", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot2 <- data2 %>% 
  filter(region == "Sardinia") %>% 
  gather(key = "variable", value = "value", -region)
pc2 <- ggplot(plot2, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = variable)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Sardinia", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot3 <- data2 %>% 
  filter(region == "Northern Italy") %>% 
  gather(key = "variable", value = "value", -region)
pc3 <- ggplot(plot3, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = variable)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Northern Italy", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
ggarrange(pc1, pc2, pc3, ncol = 3)
```

# Composition of fatty oils into olive oil filtered by area

```{r}
data7 <- olive %>% 
  group_by(region, area) %>%
  summarise(palmitic = (sum(palmitic)/n()),
            palmitoleic = (sum(palmitoleic)/n()), 
            stearic = (sum(stearic)/n()), 
            oleic = (sum(oleic)/n()), 
            linoleic = (sum(linoleic)/n()), 
            linolenic = (sum(linolenic)/n()), 
            arachidic = (sum(arachidic)/n()), 
            eicosenoic = (sum(eicosenoic)/n()), .groups = "drop") 
datatable(data7)


plot1 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "North-Apulia") %>%
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc1 <- ggplot(plot1, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "left") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - North-Apulia", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot2 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "Calabria") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc2 <- ggplot(plot2, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Calabria", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot3 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "South-Apulia") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc3 <- ggplot(plot3, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - South-Apulia", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot4 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "Sicily") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc4 <- ggplot(plot4, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Sicily", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))


plot5 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "Inland-Sardinia") %>%
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc5 <- ggplot(plot5, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Inland-Sardinia", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot6 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "Coast-Sardinia") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc6 <- ggplot(plot6, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Coast-Sardinia", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))


plot7 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "Umbria") %>%
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc7 <- ggplot(plot7, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - Umbria", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot8 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "East-Liguria") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc8 <- ggplot(plot8, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - East-Liguria", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))
plot9 <- data7 %>% 
  filter(area == "West-Liguria") %>% 
  gather(key = "fatty_acid", value = "value", -region, -area)
pc9 <- ggplot(plot7, aes(x = factor(1), y = value, fill = fatty_acid)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 1, color = "white") + 
  coord_polar("y") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  labs(title = "Composition of Fatty Oils - West-Liguria", fill = "Oil Type") + 
  theme(axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title = element_blank()) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(value, 1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5))

plots_list <- list(pc1, pc2, pc3, pc4, pc5, pc6, pc7, pc8, pc9)
grid.arrange(grobs = plots_list, nrow = 3, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "right", align = "hv") 
```
